title: platanthera bifolia subsp. extremiorientalis
intro: Platanthera bifolia subsp. extremiorientalis, also known as the northern green orchid or narrow-leaved orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Platanthera bifolia subsp. extremiorientalis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
